title: Upload data
section-additional-description: Select the type of data you'd like to include alongside the climatic dataset.
continue-tooltip: Upload climatic and additional data to continue

errors.number-of-columns: You need to select at least one column
errors.name-required: You need to give a name to your dataset
errors.consent-required: You must confirm your data storage preference before submitting
errors.temporary-storage-unavailable: Temporary storage is unavailable right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.submit-failed: Could not complete your analysis. Please try again.

email.notify-on-ready: An email will be sent when results are ready

popup.title: Your results are on the way!
popup.description-delay: This may take a few minutes.
popup.description-email: Enter your email to receive a notification once your results are ready.

submit.consent-question: Do you consent to storing your uploaded data in the database?
submit.consent-save-data-yes: Yes, you can store my uploaded data and generated results
submit.consent-save-data-no: No, keep my data only temporarily

climatic.empty-graph-message: Please select X and Y axis data and at least one chart type to generate a graph
